title: Command for viewing regular payments for a recurring BOLT12 offer
description: The **listrepeatpays** RPC command is used to view payments made with the **repeatpay** command.
Only show repeat payments for this label.
The offer we are paying (same as the bolt12 parameter to repeatpay).
The maximum millisatoshi amount we are authorized to pay per payment.
The original currency amount specified by the user (e.g. '100.00USD'), if a currency was given.
Unique label to identify this recurring payment.
The transient id we have used to identify ourselves as a (repeat) payer.
The random data we use to derive our payer_id.
Current status of the recurring payment:
- ongoing: normal state, we're just waiting for the next time to start a payment
- ongoing_making_payment: actually attempting a payment right now
- ongoing_failing_amount: the invoice we received for the next payment exceeded the `maxamount` (which you change with `amendrepeatpay`).  We will retry.
- ongoing_failing_balance: insufficient funds to make the next payment.  We will retry.
- ongoing_failing_invoice: we could not fetch the next invoice.  We will retry.
- ongoing_failing_payment: we could not pay the next invoice.  We will retry.
- complete_finished: the offer specified a limited number of payments, and they're all done
- complete_cancelled: no more payments being made because cancelrepeatpay was called
- complete_cancel_pending: someone called cancelrepeatpay, but we're waiting until the next period to tell the issuer
- complete_failed: after one or more failures, we gave up
Number of payments successfully completed so far.
Log of status transitions and notable events.

author: Rusty Russell [rusty@rustcorp.com.au](mailto:rusty@rustcorp.com.au) is mainly responsible.
